AlertRivCo: Evacuation Warning for El Cariso Village Zones RVC-1865B, RVC-1798B. Storm may cause dangerous mud and debris flows in Airport Burn Scar. For shelter assistance, call 2-1-1 or (951) 686-4402. Use caution on roadways. Do not cross flooded roadways. https://tinyurl.com/snprnayh

Potential Flood Warning. Heavy rains and run-off are expected starting Wednesday evening through Friday morning.  Residents in LOW LYING areas around the San Lorenzo River should be prepared to evacuate and move to higher ground. If possible, consider moving prior to the start of the weather system.

Evacuation Order remains. OPEN TO RESIDENTS ONLY in the City of Los Angeles as of 12:00 PM on January 19, 2025. Resident Access passes are required. Escorts not needed. Check in with LAPD from 10:00am-5:00 pm at Lot 3 Beach Access (1150 Pacific Coast Highway, Santa Monica,CA 90403). Curfew remains.
